news.title: How Resend is Building a New Kind of Email Platform for Developers
news.snippet: Resend is building email for developers. Founder Zeno Rocha on innovating in email, what developers want, and how to run a Launch Week.

news.title: Automating Developer Email with MCP and Al Agents
news.snippet: Resend's Zeno Rocha and a16z's Yoko Li discuss how AI agents and MCP are reshaping the developer experience for email creation and...

news.title: Resend Revenue 2024: $5M Est. ARR, $15M Valuation
news.snippet: What is Resend's revenue? Resend generates an estimated $5M in annual revenue. Who founded Resend? Resend was founded by Zeno Rocha.

news.title: Developer-focused email platform Resend raises $3M
news.snippet: Developer-centric email service Resend secures $3M in seed funding. Aspires to become the 'next Twilio.'

news.title: Investing in Resend
news.snippet: Resend is transforming how businesses communicate with their customers, and setting new standards for the developer experience around email...

news.title: Charm offensive: Google's Gradient backs this startup to bring more pizzazz to the command line
news.snippet: Google's VC arm Gradient Ventures has joined a $6M investment into Charm, a startup that wants to make the command line more glamorous.
